languages.text: "Эоганн, не желаешь ли устроить простолюдинам чтения о том, как важно блюсти заветы Омниссии?
"Eogunn, care to treat the commoners to a lecture on the importance of upholding the tenets of the Omnissiah?"
languages.original_text: "Эоганн, не желаешь ли устроить простолюдинам чтения о том, как важно блюсти заветы Омниссии?

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn, care to treat the commoners to a recital on the importance of upholding the tenets of the Omnissiah?"
"Eogunn, care to treat the commoners to a recital on the importance of upholding the tenets of the Omnissiah?"
"Eogunn, care to treat the commoners to a lecture on the importance of upholding the tenets of the Omnissiah?"
"Eogunn, care to treat the commoners to a lecture on the importance of upholding the tenets of the Omnissiah?"

languages.text: «Eogunn, ¿le interesaría dar un discurso a esta gente sobre la importancia de cumplir los mandamientos del Omnissiah?».
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, care to treat the commoners to a lecture on the importance of upholding the tenets of the Omnissiah?"

traits.locale_text: «Eogunn, ¿le interesaría dar un discurso a esta gente sobre la importancia de cumplir los mandamientos del Omnissiah?».

languages.text: “伊奥贡，有兴趣给这些平民讲讲恪守欧姆尼赛亚教义的重要性吗？”
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, care to treat the commoners to a lecture on the importance of upholding the tenets of the Omnissiah?"

traits.locale_text: “伊奥贡，有兴趣给这些平民讲讲恪守欧姆尼赛亚教义的重要性吗？”

languages.text: "Eogunn, würdet Ihr dem gemeinen Volk gerne einen Vortrag über die Bedeutung der Einhaltung der Gebote des Omnissiah halten?"
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, care to treat the commoners to a lecture on the importance of upholding the tenets of the Omnissiah?"

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn, würdet Ihr dem gemeinen Volk gerne einen Vortrag über die Bedeutung der Einhaltung der Gebote des Omnissiah halten?"

languages.text: « Eogunn, que diriez-vous de dispenser à la populace une leçon sur l'importance de respecter les préceptes de l'Omnimessie ? »
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, care to treat the commoners to a lecture on the importance of upholding the tenets of the Omnissiah?"

traits.locale_text: « Eogunn, que diriez-vous de dispenser à la populace une leçon sur l'importance de respecter les préceptes de l'Omnimessie ? »

languages.text: "Eogunn, sıradan halka Hermesih'in ilkelerini desteklemenin önemi üzerine konferans vermek ister misin?"
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, care to treat the commoners to a lecture on the importance of upholding the tenets of the Omnissiah?"

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn, sıradan halka Hermesih'in ilkelerini desteklemenin önemi üzerine konferans vermek ister misin?"

languages.text: 「エオグン、庶民にオムニシアスの教義を守る重要性について講義してくれないか？」
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, care to treat the commoners to a lecture on the importance of upholding the tenets of the Omnissiah?"

traits.locale_text: 「エオグン、庶民にオムニシアスの教義を守る重要性について講義してくれないか？」
